full_text:
Liang Xiu (Yuanjian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Xiu, styledYuanjian. Held local and clerical office before the Great Proscription saw him leave office. Liang Xiu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liang Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
